creator: townwear@gmail.com
text:
You can not browse 2ch.net with this software already.

A 2ch browser that does not support 2ch.net's new API can no longer access 2ch.net. Under the terms of use of the new API, API specifications are also included in confidential information because open source development became a tough situation.

Reference Link: http://jd4linux.osdn.jp/
